Business Meaning: Company A faces a major customer retention problem.

Key Finding: Churned customers have nearly the same average monthly revenue as retained customers.
Business Meaning: Churn creates a real revenue-risk issue, not only a low-value customer issue.

Key Finding: Churned customers show lower average monthly usage.
Business Meaning: Lower engagement may indicate early churn risk.

Key Finding: Churned customers show a sharper decline in monthly usage.
Business Meaning: Usage decline can be used as an early warning signal.

Key Finding: Churned customers have older equipment on average.
Business Meaning: Device upgrade offers may help reduce churn among high-risk customers.
